creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
bzip2 became part of FreeBSD base system since 4.4-RELEASE (September 2001), almost 20 years ago, and there is no other ports depending on archivers/bzip2.

The port system expects /usr/bin/bzip2 and expects base system tar to recognize it; bzip2 1.0.7 introduced a quite visible regression with decompression, and the port wasn't updated for 2 years, so I believe there is no real users of it and the port should be removed.
